parameters.jsCode: const ev=$('Stripe Trigger').first().json;const s=(ev.data&&ev.data.object)?ev.data.object:ev;const li=($json&&$json.data)?$json.data:[];const items=li.map(i=>(i.quantity+'× '+(i.description||''))).join(', ')||'(see Stripe)';const cust=s.customer_details||{};const sd=s.shipping_details||s.shipping||(s.collected_information&&s.collected_information.shipping_details)||null;const addr=(sd&&sd.address)||cust.address||{};const name=(sd&&sd.name)||cust.name||'';const addrStr=[addr.line1,addr.line2,[addr.postal_code,addr.city].filter(Boolean).join(' '),addr.state,addr.country].filter(Boolean).join(', ');const phone=cust.phone||'';const amt=((s.amount_total!=null?s.amount_total:(s.amount!=null?s.amount:0)))/100;const o={order:'EL-'+String(s.id||'').slice(-8).toUpperCase(),date:new Date((s.created?s.created*1000:Date.now())).toISOString(),email:cust.email||s.customer_email||'',customer:name,amount:amt,currency:String(s.currency||'eur').toUpperCase(),country:addr.country||'',items:items,address:addrStr,phone:phone,stripeId:s.id||''};o.notionBody=JSON.stringify({parent:{database_id:'37ea4815-a826-81eb-ab38-f65e104a0a83'},icon:{type:'emoji',emoji:'🧾'},properties:{Order:{title:[{text:{content:o.order}}]},Date:{date:{start:o.date}},Email:{email:o.email||null},Customer:{rich_text:[{text:{content:o.customer}}]},Amount:{number:o.amount},Currency:{select:{name:'EUR'}},Items:{rich_text:[{text:{content:o.items}}]},Address:{rich_text:[{text:{content:o.address}}]},Phone:{rich_text:[{text:{content:o.phone}}]},Country:{rich_text:[{text:{content:o.country}}]},Payment:{select:{name:'Paid'}},Fulfilment:{select:{name:'To pack'}},'Stripe ID':{rich_text:[{text:{content:o.stripeId}}]}}});return [{json:o}];
